name: Huntingtonized
description_short: Huntingtonized FCU is a member-owned credit union offering checking, savings, auto loans, personal loans, and deposit accounts with competitive rates and no-surcharge ATM access.
description_long:
Huntingtonized Federal Credit Union (HFCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union operating under NCUA insurance protections. The organization emphasizes accessibility with a $5.00 minimum deposit requirement for membership, positioning itself as inclusive to consumers seeking alternatives to traditional banking. The credit union has established operations with scheduled disaster recovery testing and maintains a web presence since at least the mid-2000s based on their institutional maturity.

HFCU offers a comprehensive range of consumer financial products including share accounts (savings), share draft accounts (checking), share certificates (CDs), and Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs). On the lending side, they provide auto loans starting at 4.25% APR for new vehicles and 5.00% for used vehicles, personal loans beginning at 9.90% APR, and a Visa Platinum credit card. Members have access to online and mobile banking, bill pay services, electronic funds transfers, and loan applications processed digitally.

The credit union distinguishes itself through a member-first philosophy stated on their homepage: "Your Membership with HFCU means we are here to be part of the solution, not the problem." They provide financial education tools including a "Checking Navigator" for financial literacy, access to third-party resources like NADA Guides and Edmunds for auto research, and comprehensive consumer protection resources (ID theft information, credit bureau contacts, NCUA insurance details). Their no-surcharge ATM locator tool and overdraft opt-in forms reflect consumer-friendly policies.

Huntingtonized FCU appears to be a regional credit union with limited geographic footprint based on website content mentioning specific office closures. While they offer competitive auto loan rates and maintain modern digital banking infrastructure, the profile lacks detailed information about membership eligibility criteria beyond the $5 minimum deposit, specific branch locations, or loan approval timelines. The organization provides solid core banking and lending services typical of community credit unions but without premium differentiation like cash-back rewards or specialized business lending noted on their site.
services: Online and mobile account access and enrollment
No-surcharge ATM locator and network access
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.25% APR for new vehicles and 5.00% for used vehicles
$5.00 minimum deposit requirement makes membership accessible to consumers with limited funds
No-surcharge ATM locator tool and network access reduce out-of-pocket fees
NCUA insurance protection on deposits up to $250,000 per member
Comprehensive online and mobile banking with bill pay, e-funds transfer, and digital loan applications
Financial education resources including Checking Navigator tool and third-party auto/credit research access
Member-focused philosophy explicitly stated with commitment to being "part of the solution"
cons: Personal loan APR starting at 9.90% is higher than competitive market rates from many online lenders
Limited geographic availability suggested by single office location reference and disaster recovery testing language
Website lacks details on membership eligibility beyond the $5 minimum, loan approval timelines, and specific service fees
No mention of specialized products like business loans, mortgage services, or investment options
Appears to be a smaller regional credit union without national brand recognition or extensive ATM network beyond no-surcharge agreements
best_for: Consumers seeking membership-based banking with low barriers to entry ($5 minimum deposit)
Auto buyers looking for competitive loan rates in the 4-5% APR range
Community members in HFCU's service area wanting deposit accounts with NCUA insurance protection
Members interested in financial education tools and consumer protection resources
diagnosis: Huntingtonized FCU is best suited for consumers in its service area seeking straightforward consumer banking and auto financing with competitive rates and NCUA-insured protection. The main caveat is that membership appears geographically limited based on office-specific communications, and personal loan rates at 9.90% APR are not competitive with national online lenders, making auto financing their strongest value proposition.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Huntingtonized — Credit Union in Huntington, WV | CreditDoc
meta_description: Huntingtonized — NCUA-insured credit union in Huntington, WV. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
